name: Coeur a La Creme
recipeInstructions:
------------------STRAWBERRY SAUCE------------------
1. 1 pkg frozen strawberries
1/4 tsp almond extract
1. Beat Neufchatel, cottage, and ricotta cheeses in a bowl until fairly smooth. On low speed, beat in yogurt.
2. Line a sieve or colander with a double layer of cheesecloth. Place over a large bowl. Scrape the cheese mixture into the lined sieve. Fold the ends of the cheesecloth over; cover with plastic wrap. Fit a plate or bowl over the cheese mixture; top with 1 pound (450 g) cabbage leaves.
3. Refrigerate overnight; discard the drained liquid as it accumulates.
4. Turn the cheese mixture into a bowl. Stir in sugar, orange rind, and vanilla. Line a heart-shaped mold or other mold with plastic wrap. Top with a double-layered cheesecloth. Fill with cheese mixture. Fold the ends of the cheesecloth and wrap over top. Refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight.
5. Unwrap the mold. Invert the platter over the mold; turn over. Remove the mold, plastic wrap, and cheesecloth. Surround with strawberry sauce; garnish with berries.
STRAWBERRY SAUCE
Puree frozen strawberries in syrup, almond extract in a small food processor or blender.
NOTE: Berry juice causes Cœur to separate; serve berries around the sides.
